_instructions: CTA philosophy and active CTAs across all platforms. Skills use this to end content consistently and avoid conflicting or duplicate keyword triggers. One CTA per piece — always. Never beg. Match the relationship level to the content type.

cta_style.philosophy: [DESCRIBE YOUR CTA APPROACH — e.g. 'Short, direct, low-friction. Prefer keyword DM triggers to filter intent. Spoken casually at the end as if it just occurred to me — never pushed.' OR 'Soft and engagement-first. Questions that invite replies. Never hard-sell in organic content.' OR 'Save-focused for educational content. DM triggers for high-intent conversion content.']

cta_ladder.cold_audience: [CTA for new/cold audience — e.g. 'Save this for later' or 'Follow for more on [topic]']
cta_ladder.warm_audience: [CTA for engaged followers — e.g. 'Reply with your biggest challenge' or 'DM me [KEYWORD]']
cta_ladder.hot_audience: [CTA for ready-to-buy — e.g. 'Book a call at [URL]' or 'DM me [KEYWORD] and I'll send the details']

active_keyword_triggers.delivers: [WHAT THE AUTO-DM SENDS — e.g. 'PDF breakdown of the content system']
active_keyword_triggers.use_in: [WHICH SKILLS/PLATFORMS THIS TRIGGER IS ACTIVE ON]

linkedin: [LINKEDIN CTA 1 — e.g. 'What's your experience with this? Comment below.']
[LINKEDIN CTA 2 — e.g. 'Save this for the next time you need it.']
instagram: [INSTAGRAM CTA 1 — e.g. 'Save this — you'll want to come back to it.']
[INSTAGRAM CTA 2 — e.g. 'Send this to someone who needs to hear it.']
[INSTAGRAM CTA 3 — e.g. 'DM me [KEYWORD] and I'll send you the full breakdown.']
x_threads: [X CTA 2 — e.g. 'What would you add? Reply below.']
newsletter: [NEWSLETTER CTA 1 — e.g. 'Hit reply and tell me [specific question] — I read every response.']
[NEWSLETTER CTA 2 — e.g. 'Forward this to one person who'd get something from it.']
youtube: [YOUTUBE CTA 2 — e.g. 'Tell me in the comments: [specific question]']

never_say: Don't forget to like and subscribe
Drop a comment if you agree
